channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: China urges India-Japan partnership not to be directed against its interests amid supply chain cooperation
item.description: China has stated that the growing strategic partnership between India and Japan should not be directed against its interests, following a series of agreements signed between New Delhi and Tokyo to str...

item.title: Kenyan businessman recounts losses and assault after returning from South Africa amid xenophobic tensions
item.description: A Kenyan Somali businessman, Ali Sambul, has shared his difficult experience after returning home from South Africa, where he had lived and worked for several years. Speaking upon his arrival in Kenya...

item.title: Sowore alleges long-standing political persecution over decades of activism and arrests
item.description: Omoyele Sowore, the presidential candidate of the African Action Congress (AAC), has alleged that successive Nigerian governments have been targeting him since he was 18 years old due to his activism ...

item.title: Centre seeks responses from Telegram and Signal over username-based features amid privacy and fraud concerns
item.description: The Union government of India has issued notices to messaging platforms Telegram and Signal, asking them to explain the safeguards they have in place to prevent misuse of username-based communication ...

item.title: Winter travel in South Africa: embracing slower journeys and reflective experiences
item.description: The article explores the unique character of winter travel, focusing on how the colder season encourages a slower, more reflective way of experiencing places in South Africa and beyond. It describes w...

item.title: India probes Tata data breach exposing iPhone 18 Pro details
item.description: India's Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology is investigating a data breach at Tata Electronics, which leaked sensitive documents related to Apple's unreleased iPhone 18 Pro. The breach,...

item.title: Eby likens federal-provincial condo purchase plan to liquidation sales amid housing debate
item.description: British Columbia Premier David Eby has defended a joint federal-provincial initiative aimed at purchasing unsold condominiums and converting them into affordable housing, describing the approach as si...

item.title: Cricket Ireland chief says T20 series win over India will improve Ireland’s global standing
item.description: Cricket Ireland president Bryan O’Donnell has said that Ireland’s recent 2-0 T20 International series win over India in Belfast will significantly boost the team’s global reputation and make them a mo...

item.title: Kenya Court Dismisses Legal Challenge Against JW Marriott Mara Safari Camp
item.description: The Environment and Land Court in Kenya has dismissed a legal challenge against the JW Marriott Mara Safari Camp, ruling that the petitioners bypassed legal procedures by directly approaching the cour...

item.title: Police officer and civilian accomplice arrested for murder of fellow policeman in Zamboanga del Sur
item.description: A police officer and his civilian accomplice have been arrested in connection with the killing of a fellow policeman in Zamboanga del Sur, Philippines. The victim, Corporal Armejo Jornadal of the 2nd ...

item.title: Afreximbank calls for African industrialisation of resources to drive development and sovereignty
item.description: Afreximbank President Dr George Elombi has called for a major shift in Africa’s economic model, urging countries on the continent to prioritise industrialisation and value addition instead of continui...

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's Marriage Announced Ahead of New York Event
item.description: Pop music megastar Taylor Swift and National Football League player Travis Kelce are reported to have married, according to the New York Post’s Page Six. The couple, both 36, exchanged vows in a priva...

item.title: US reiterates support for Pakistan’s self-defence rights amid UN counterterrorism strategy vote
item.description: The United States has reaffirmed its support for Pakistan’s right to defend itself against terrorist attacks amid rising tensions along the Pakistan-Afghanistan border and ongoing debates at the Unite...

item.title: TARURA expands community-based rural road maintenance to improve year-round accessibility across Tanzania
item.description: The Tanzania Rural and Urban Roads Agency (TARURA) is expanding its Community-Based Routine Maintenance (CBRM) programme to improve year-round accessibility of rural and urban roads while also creatin...

item.title: Demolition planned for former Hudson’s Bay retail space at Devonshire Mall in Windsor
item.description: The article reports that the former Hudson’s Bay retail space at Devonshire Mall in Windsor is set to be demolished. The announcement signals the next step in the evolution of the shopping centre’s ph...

item.title: Audit reveals irregularities in KSh 69 million Kiambu Town bursary allocations
item.description: The Auditor General has raised serious concerns over the management of KSh 69.3 million bursary funds in Kiambu Town Constituency under the National Government Constituencies Development Fund (NG-CDF)...

item.title: A weekly roundup of humorous parenting moments shared on social media
item.description: This article from HuffPost highlights a curated collection of humorous posts from parents shared across social media platforms such as X, Threads, and Bluesky during the week of June 27 to July 3. The...

item.title: Fubara calls for God-fearing leadership, praises Seventh-day Adventist Church role in education
item.description: Governor of Rivers State, Sir Siminalayi Fubara, has emphasised that Nigeria needs leaders who fear God in order to achieve meaningful progress and national development. He made this statement when he...

item.title: Khampepe commission continues inquiry into alleged delays in apartheid-era TRC prosecutions in Johannesburg
item.description: The Khampepe commission of inquiry continued its proceedings in Newtown, Johannesburg, on Friday, as it investigates allegations that efforts were made to stall or obstruct investigations and prosecut...

item.title: Weekly Canadian Book Bestsellers Rankings Across Multiple Categories for July 4, 2026
item.description: This article presents the weekly bestseller lists compiled by The Globe and Mail for the week of July 4, 2026, based on national sales data from BookNet Canada’s BNC SalesData. The rankings cover mult...
